overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a luxury high-rise apartment. The player moves from a dark neon-lit area overlooking Night City through sunlit dining and living spaces, interacting with objects. The atmosphere is cyberpunk luxury with red neon accents and modern minimalist design.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment walkway overlooking Night City

events.description: camera moves from dark red-lit interior to window revealing illuminated city street below
camera turns right to follow the window walkway overlooking the city

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the apartment walkway looking out at the Night City street below

entered.detail: glowing red LED strips running along the ceiling edges
transparent glass railing along the elevated walkway
aerial view of multi-lane city street with vehicles and streetlights
distant illuminated skyscrapers visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark luxury apartment interior illuminated by red neon strips. The player walks along a glass-railed walkway overlooking Night City, with the glowing cityscape and traffic visible far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment walkway transitioning to dining area

events.description: sunlight begins streaming through window blinds creating striped shadows on the floor
turning away from the window into the interior dining space with pendant lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway then turning inward toward the dining area as morning sunlight illuminates the space

entered.detail: horizontal blinds casting striped shadows across the wooden floor
modern rectangular table with place settings and a red runner
hanging rectangular red neon light fixtures above the dining table

segments.scene_description: Moving along the window, the player transitions from the dark exterior view into a sunlit dining area. Horizontal blinds cast striped shadows across the floor while red pendant lights hang above the modern dining table.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining and living area with modern cyberpunk decor

events.description: camera moves around the dining table toward the living area with couches
player interacts with items on the coffee table triggering game UI prompts

agents.ego_description: examining the dining area then moving to the living room and interacting with objects on the coffee table

entered.detail: modern white couch with red accent pillows
low black coffee table with magazines and interactive items
tall bamboo stalks in black planters dividing the space
large textured red rug under the seating area

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the dining area into a spacious living room featuring a white sectional sofa, black coffee table with interactive items, and bamboo plants. Sunlight continues to stream through the windows creating dramatic lighting patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room with decorative bamboo installation and ambient lighting

events.description: player approaches and examines the decorative bamboo plants with interaction prompt visible
camera focuses on bamboo illuminated by red accent lighting creating atmospheric glow

agents.ego_description: moving through the living area and closely examining the decorative bamboo installation and wall art

entered.detail: abstract blue and white framed artwork on the dark wall
small table with lit candle and incense holder
transparent glass wall with city view beyond

segments.scene_description: The player explores the living area focusing on a decorative bamboo installation illuminated by red accent lighting. A side table with a lit candle and abstract wall art add to the cyberpunk luxury atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar and kitchen area with bright city views

events.description: entering the bar area with bright morning sunlight streaming through large windows
camera pans across the bar counter showing stools, digital displays, and kitchen equipment

agents.ego_description: walking into the bar area and examining the counter, stools, and view through the bright windows

entered.detail: long black bar counter with red accent lighting and modern bar stools
large screen displaying abstract blue graphics and data
modern kitchen equipment and shelving behind the bar
floor-to-ceiling windows with intense morning sunlight and city view

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a sleek bar and kitchen area bathed in bright morning sunlight. The player examines the bar counter with its red accent lighting, digital wall displays, and the stunning city view through floor-to-ceiling windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxury high-rise apartment that transitions from a dark, neon-lit corridor into a bright, sun-drenched living space. It begins on a glass-railed walkway illuminated by red neon strips, overlooking the glowing traffic and cityscape of Night City far below. As the camera moves forward, the dark exterior view gives way to a sunlit dining area where horizontal blinds cast striped shadows across the floor beneath red pendant lights. The scene then expands into a spacious living room featuring a white sectional sofa and bamboo plants, before shifting focus toward a decorative bamboo installation and abstract wall art accented by red lighting. Finally, the movement leads into a sleek bar and kitchen area bathed in bright morning sunlight, concluding with a view of digital displays and the city skyline through floor-to-ceiling windows.
